summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard without planning mutations. No shared canonical exists; each open PR remains open for maintainer or proof-gated follow-up. Close, merge, fix, and low-signal closeout are disabled or unsafe for this job.

actions.reason: Keep as related tracking context for the CLI trajectory work; no close or fix action is allowed in this inventory job.
Related cron delivery diagnostic follow-up, not a duplicate or close candidate for this shard.
Focused, plausible bug fix with green evidence but a product compatibility decision remains; keep open for maintainer review.
Useful contributor PR, but merge/fix are not allowed here and current review/check blockers require maintainer or repair-lane follow-up.
Not low-signal, but proof, compatibility, data-model, and failing-check questions block any automated close or advancement.
Maintainer-owned draft with active maintainer signal; keep open for the owner or maintainer review rather than closing or relabeling.
Maintainer-owned draft with focused code changes and skipped broad gates; keep open for maintainer-controlled finalization.

#81046: maintainer must decide whether to pursue the persisted cooldown design after real behavior proof, compatibility, data-model, and CI failures are addressed.
#90224: maintainer-owned draft needs owner/maintainer finalization and broad changed-gate proof.
